intro.de: A living index of a research institute's archive, rendered in WebGL.
intro.en: A living index of a research institute's archive, rendered in WebGL.

de: Atlas needed its public archive to feel alive rather than filed. We built a navigable index where entries drift and cluster by relation.
A custom WebGL layer handles the field of entries at 60fps; everything degrades gracefully to a static index without JS.
en: Atlas needed its public archive to feel alive rather than filed. We built a navigable index where entries drift and cluster by relation.
A custom WebGL layer handles the field of entries at 60fps; everything degrades gracefully to a static index without JS.
